results.rendered_html: pipīlikā—madhya mfn. N. of a kind of fast (beginning on the day of full moon with 15 mouthfuls, decreasing by one daily until the day of new moon, and after that increasing by one daily until the next day of full moon),  Kull.  on  Mn. xi, 256.
